description: Failure log hooks for capturing mistakes and injecting learned lessons

hooks.prompt: Analyze if this tool use resulted in an error, was corrected by the user, or represents a pattern that should be avoided in the future. If YES (this is a mistake worth remembering), respond with JSON: {"is_failure": true, "category": "imports|security|testing|architecture|conventions", "summary": "brief description", "correct_approach": "what should be done instead"}. If NO (normal successful operation), respond with: {"is_failure": false}. Tool result: $TOOL_RESULT
